title: Floral and Space Designer
description:
Work Details

  • Location: Midview City (Bishan)
  • Working Hours: 5.5 Day work week (Off day on a weekday)
  • Full Work Day (Including Sundays): 8.30am - 5.30pm
  • Saturdays: 4 Hour Shift (Morning or Afternoon)

Responsibilities

  • Meet with clients to discuss their preferences and vision for the wake
  • Conceptualise, plan, and create mockups and drawings of the setup accordingly
  • Design and create floral arrangements, including casket sprays, sympathy arrangements, and other decorative pieces, using a variety of flowers and materials.
  • Create a welcoming and comforting space for the wake, incorporating appropriate decor and personalised items
  • Coordinate with funeral homes and other vendors to ensure that all elements of the wake come together seamlessly
  • Lead and handle all onsite setup and arrangement of floral displays and decor at the wake, ensuring that they are respectful and appropriate
  • Leads team of florist to create floral arrangements for special or customised packages
  • Maintain inventory of floral supplies and other equipment, and procure additional items as needed
  • Provide exceptional customer service to bereaved families, showing empathy and sensitivity throughout the process
  • Ensure proper communication of project status, timelines and delivery information to both internal and external stakeholders
  • Prepration of floral wreaths, table arrangements and etc.
  • Managing stock inventory
  • Fulfilling of floral orders
  • Liaising with suppliers on orders of flowers, or other materials needed for daily operations
  • Care / preparation / storage of flowers upon receipt
  • Maintain cleanliness and tidiness of the workspace
  • Taking order and answering phone call / WhatsApp enquiries
  • Ensuring daily operations
  • Any other ad-hoc tasks as required

Requirements

  • Minimum 2 years experience working as a florist
  • Able to commit weekends and public holidays
  • Good Customer Service skill
  • Able to handle physical work in order to lift heavy water pails etc
  • Passionate about floral design
  • Creative and able to take initiative
  • Works well under pressure

postedCompany.description: A boutique florist in Singapore, Petal Elements creates classy yet feminine looking floral arrangements guaranteed to make your loved ones smile. Grown through a passion and love for flowers, we believe in the therapeutic powers of flowers. We love spreading joy and beauty through our creations, and we hope to find like-minded individuals to work together with. Join us in our journey as we seek to grow into one of the leading florists in Singapore!
postedCompany.name: PETAL ELEMENTS PTE. LTD.
